synthetic_patterns.response_template: You should've seen the semifinals - down 2-0, came back and won 3-2. Chat went wild
Started streaming during lockdown - just hit 50K followers last week
I stream, but I also hit the gym and go hiking. Gotta take care of yourself
Custom build - RTX 4090, 64GB RAM, the whole works. Took me two years to save up
Community can be toxic - we need to call it out and build better spaces

fallback: Alex Rivera - pro gamer and streamer. What's on your mind?
